creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to nistor from comment #2)

I found the problem: for some reason, all tabs have been converted to spaces in your patch.  Don't do that please.  Make sure your patch survives the transport to bugzilla unmolested!  This can e.g. haben when you copy-paste by mouse from a terminal window.  Don't do that.  Instead use a file transfer tool like scp or sftp.

Please resubmit the patch without this destruction.
